name_cn:
VANITY Handbag #️⃣M45165
Exclusive global launch! This item is crafted with the same custom Italian production process as the authentic version, featuring dynamic chip re-coding, original factory materials, and original factory electroplated gold-plated full steel hardware (color matches the authentic version)
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic look! Exclusive original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, and the latest official website gift box!
19 x 13 x 11 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Double zipper closure with padlock
Interior patch pocket
Key case
Base studs
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 52.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in Italy
